title: When you realize that you’re the senior dev now.
summary: A YouTube video from Google for Developers featuring Pete King with humorous commentary on reaching senior developer status. The video appears to be motivational content about career advancement in software development.
writeup: This Google for Developers short features Pete King with humorous commentary on what it feels like to reach senior developer status. The framing is motivational, treating the moment of realizing one has become the senior dev as a marker of career advancement in software development. The content leans on relatable humor rather than technical instruction.
